title: adlumia fungosa
intro: Adlumia fungosa, also known as the ragged golden ragwort, is a biennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Adlumia fungosa include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
